overall.description: Gameplay footage from a survival horror or action game featuring a character in a red and beige jacket exploring a dimly lit industrial interior. The sequence shows the character moving from a small storage room through a narrow corridor into a larger warehouse-like space with blood stains on the floor, utilizing a third-person over-the-shoulder camera perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with equipment chest

events.description: camera shifts from top-down perspective to third-person over-the-shoulder view as character begins moving

agents.ego_description: character stands near a green chest in a dimly lit storage room, then begins walking forward as the camera angle changes

entered.detail: large green military-style storage chest with latches
black metal shelving unit with multiple tiers holding equipment
worn fabric and metal folding chair with armrests
textured tan floor covering covering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a cramped, dimly lit storage room with a green military chest at the center. The camera begins in a top-down perspective before transitioning to a third-person over-the-shoulder view as the character in a red jacket starts to move. A wire shelving unit and folding chair occupy the right side of the space.

events.description: character exits the small storage room and enters a narrow corridor with a visible bathroom area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor toward the bathroom doorway, passing by wall-mounted fixtures

entered.detail: open doorway leading to a small bathroom area with white fixtures
standard white porcelain toilet visible in the bathroom nook
metal shelves attached to the wall holding various containers
vertical metal piping running along the corrugated wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the storage room into a narrow corridor with exposed metal pipes along the left wall. A bathroom doorway becomes visible ahead, revealing a white toilet in a small nook. Wall-mounted shelves line the right side as the character progresses forward, leaving the green chest behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with metal platforms and blood stains

events.description: character enters a larger industrial room with raised metal platforms and visible blood stains on the floor

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the industrial room, surveying the blood-stained metal flooring and surrounding shelving units

entered.detail: elevated metal flooring with diamond plate texture and red blood stains
tall metal storage racks with multiple levels holding crates and equipment
dark red blood splatters and pools on the metal floor surface
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling providing harsh illumination
vertical ladder attached to the platform structure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a larger industrial storage room with raised metal platforms. Blood stains are visible on the floor, suggesting recent violence. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate metal shelving units filled with crates and equipment, while a metal ladder provides access to the elevated platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit storage room into a sprawling, blood-stained industrial warehouse. It begins with a top-down perspective centered on a green military chest before shifting to a third-person over-the-shoulder view as the character in a red jacket moves past a folding chair and wire shelving. As the character exits the room, the space narrows into a corridor lined with exposed metal pipes and wall-mounted shelves, passing a small bathroom nook with a white toilet. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the hallway into a larger storage area illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. Finally, the camera reveals a grim environment of metal shelving units and raised platforms, with blood stains marking the floor near a metal ladder.
